args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono entry point class that extends HonoBase and sets up default routing with SmartRouter.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, RouterRoute, GetPath, router, routes, matchResult, #dispatch, #clone, #notFoundHandler, errorHandler, basePath, route, mount, fetch, request, fire.
- Simple note: Default constructor creates a SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Core implementation of Hono application with handler registration, middleware support, and request dispatching.
- Names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Composition, Router, METHODS, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, HonoOptions, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, MountOptions, #addRoute, #handleError, #dispatch, compose, baseApp, app, #path, _basePath, routes, errorResponse, fetch, request.
- Simple note: Contains the main request handling logic and handler composition via the compose function.

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Export entry point for PatternRouter.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
- Simple note: Simple index file that re-exports the main router implementation.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter using regex-based pattern matching with parameter extraction.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, Params, Result, Router, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, add, match, regex construction, wildcard handling, parameter capture groups.
- Simple note: Converts path patterns into regex, matches requests, and extracts parameters into groups.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Export entry point for LinearRouter.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
- Simple note: Simple index file that re-exports the main router implementation.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter with linear iteration through route definitions for matching.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, ROUTES, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, ROUTES, hasStar, hasLabel, splitByStarRe, checkOptionalParameter, add, match, params.
- Simple note: Iterates through all routes in order; uses linear matching with early exit on match.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Export entry point for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, match.
- Simple note: Re-exports RegExpRouter and optimization variants for production use.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter with pre-built regex matchers for efficient matching.
- Names notices: RegExpRouter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, checkOptionalParameter.
- Simple note: Builds matchers once from routes, then reuses them for fast matching; supports middleware patterns.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines matcher types and the core matching function for RegExpRouter.
- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Router, Matcher, ParamStash, HandlerData, StaticMap, emptyParam, match.
- Simple note: Type definitions and the match function that applies regex and returns results with param stash.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter for optimized startup with pre-built matchers.
- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, HandlerData, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, match, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, add, addPath, addWildcard, buildAllMatchers.
- Simple note: Pre-built matcher version for SSR/static exports; separates router setup from runtime matching.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Implements Node class for trie-based pattern building in RegExpRouter.
- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars, compareKey, insert, buildRegExpStr, #index, #varIndex, #children.
- Simple note: Builds a trie structure from paths; generates regex strings with parameter indexes.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Implements Trie class for organizing path segments in RegExpRouter.
- Names noticed: Trie, ParamAssocArray, Context, ReplacementMap, PATH_ERROR, regExpMetaChars, insert, buildRegExp, #context, #root, groups.
- Simple note: Converts tokenized paths into regex with handler indexes and param replacement maps.

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Export entry point for SmartRouter.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
- Simple note: Simple index file that re-exports the main router implementation.

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter that tries multiple routers sequentially and uses the first match.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, activeRouter, #routers, #routes, buildAllMatchers, #buildMatcher.
- Simple note: Wraps multiple routers; selects the best matching router per request and delegates matching.

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Export entry point for TrieRouter.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
- Simple note: Simple index file that re-exports the main router implementation.

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using a tree-based structure for path matching.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren, insert, search, #methods, #children, #patterns, #order, #params.
- Simple note: Uses a tree structure with branching on literal segments; supports multiple handlers per node.

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Implements Node class for trie structure in TrieRouter.
- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Params, Pattern, emptyParams, hasChildren, insert, search, #methods, #children, #patterns, #order, #params, possibleKeys.
- Simple note: Each node can hold multiple handlers for different methods; tree traverses on request matching.

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test suite for common routing behaviors across all routers.
- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, skip, newRouter, router, match, Basic Usage, Reserved words, Complex, Registration order, Multi match, params, Duplicate param name, page, star, Optional route, All, long prefix then star, Including slashes, Capture simple multiple directories, Capture regex pattern has trailing wildcard, Capture complex multiple directories, Capture multiple directories and optional, non ascii characters, REST API, Trailing slash, Same path, Routing with a hostname, static routes of ALL and GET, ALL and Star, GET star, ALL static, GET star..., Capture Group, Unknown method.
- Simple note: Comprehensive test cases for all routers; used by individual router test files.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for PatternRouter implementation.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip, Duplicate param name, Trailing slash, GET /book/.
- Simple note: Tests skip cases unsupported by PatternRouter; includes trailing slash handling tests.

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for LinearRouter implementation.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip, Multi match, params per a handler, Trailing slash, Skip part, GET /products/list.
- Simple note: Tests skip cases unsupported by LinearRouter; includes named parameter regex limitations.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for RegExpRouter implementation including error cases.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip, Return value type, Ambiguous, Multiple handlers with different label, parent, child, static and dynamic, different regular expression, Capture Group, Complex capturing group.
- Simple note: Tests ambiguous route cases that throw errors; validates regex pattern constraints.

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Integration tests for SmartRouter using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: Runs common test suite with both routers in sequence; validates fallback behavior.

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter implementation.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, Basic Usage, Name path, Name path - Multiple route, Param prefix, Named params and a wildcard, Wildcard, Regexp, All, Special Wildcard, Default with wildcard, Multi match, Duplicate param name, Sort Order, star, Routing order With named parameters, The same name is used for path params, Node with initial method and handler.
- Simple note: Comprehensive trie traversal tests; includes multi-match handler ordering.

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter Node class.
- Names noticed: Node, Basic Usage, Root Node, Root Node is not defined, Get with *, Get with * including JS reserved words, Name path, Name path - Multiple route, Param prefix, Named params and a wildcard, Wildcard, Regexp, All, Special Wildcard, Default with wildcard, Multi match, Duplicate param name, Sort Order, star, Routing order With named parameters, The same name is used for path params.
- Simple note: Tests trie operations directly; isolates Node behavior from router integration.

## Cross-File Checklist

- **pattern-router**: `src/router/pattern-router/index.ts`, `src/router/pattern-router/router.ts`, `src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts` - Regex-based pattern matching with parameter extraction; skip ambiguous routes.

- **linear-router**: `src/router/linear-router/index.ts`, `src/router/linear-router/router.ts`, `src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts` - Linear iteration through route definitions; simple matching logic with early exit on match.

- **reg-exp-router**: `src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts`, `src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts`, `src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts`, `src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts`, `src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts`, `src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts`, `src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts` - Pre-built regex matchers for efficient matching; trie-based pattern building; optimized startup with Prepared variant.

- **smart-router**: `src/router/smart-router/index.ts`, `src/router/smart-router/router.ts`, `src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts` - Wraps multiple routers; tries each sequentially and uses first match; sets active router per request.

- **trie-router**: `src/router/trie-router/index.ts`, `src/router/trie-router/router.ts`, `src/router/trie-router/node.ts`, `src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts`, `src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts` - Tree-based path matching with multiple handlers per node; supports complex wildcard patterns.

---

- `bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md` (only file created in this task)

**Verification Status:**
- Directory created: `bench-artifacts/`
- File written: `routing-read-write-ledger.md`
- All 24 source files read and documented
- Cross-file checklist completed for all 5 router families
